release_summary: Two architectural fixes consolidating multiple known signal-correctness bugs. (1) probAvailable horizon: pre-v2.2.0 computed wait-risk at the CURRENT pick (always ~0 for past-ADP candidates), making ALL pGone-gated stack/bring-back/capture/scarcity/capital-boost signals answer the wrong question. v2.2.0 splits into probAvailable (current-turn sanity filter) + probAvailableNextTurn (true wait-risk driving pGone). pgone_decay decayed-blend band-aid deleted; all 34 pGone-gated weights refit from scratch via 88-LHS Phase H pipeline. (2) Chain-correlation accumulators: stack credit was QB-anchor only; same-team WR-WR / RB-RB / TE-TE chains earned zero. v2.2.0 adds sameTeamChainContribution + opposingTeamChainContribution using empirical ρ from correlations.json (WR-WR 0.40, RB-RB 0.20, TE-TE 0.20 same-team; WR-WR 0.12, QB-QB 0.10 opposing in playoff weeks). Gated by v2.1.13 _qualityMult so rank-poor candidates don't get pushed by stack credit alone. Result: Wan'Dale Robinson (TEN, same-team with Carnell Tate) FLIPS above Romeo Doubs (NE) on R10 P112 — the architectural fix is empirically validated. Phase H sweep across 3 cluster anchors x 88 LHS samples x 36 dims: BBM7 ships lhs77 (same_chain=14.9, opp_chain=24.6, +$808 prize +0.007 log_u), Dachshund + MiniGolden ship lhs79 (chain=12.7/4.9). 15 contests now in registry (added: Pomeranian, Puppy2, Frenchie5, HoundDog, Pointer, SFBSatellite). pgone_decay knob deleted; net knob delta = -1 + 2 = +1.
